sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 16.109 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.16)

statement.latex: Is there a polynomial time algorithm for solving the word problem in the group${ Aut}\, F_n$(with respect to some particular finite presentation), where$F_n$is the free group of rank$n 2$? { V.\,E.\,Shpilrain} Yes, there is (S.\,Schleimer, Comment. Math. Helv., 83 (2008), 741--765). { {Archive of solved problems (17th ed., 2010)}}{ {Archive of solved problems (17th ed., 2010)}}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
